verses.text: Topa phat un. Bang hang hiam cih leh eite' Pasian' tungah phatnate i sak ding hoih hi. Phatna sak ding nuam a, zong a kilawm ahi hi
Topa in Jerusalem khuapi lam a, amah in a kinilkhia Israel-te a kaikhawm hi
Amah in lungsim kitamte damsak a, amau' meimate a tuamsak hi
Amah in aksite a phazah ding seh a, tua aksite amau min ciatin a sam hi
Eite' Topa lian a, ama vang lian mahmah hi. Amah in thu a theihtelna pen ngaihsutzawh ding hilo hi
Topa in a kisikcip mite laamto-in, migilote leilak a den'na hi
Topa tungah lungdam kohna la sa un la, laia lasakna tawh eite' Pasian' tungah la ngaih sa un
Amah in vanpite meiipi tawh tuamin, leitung-a' dingin gun bawl a, mualte tungah lopa a posak hi
Amah in ganhingte leh a ham va-aknote an a vak hi
Ama lungkimna leh amah in nuam a saknate pen sakol thahatna leh galhangte' hang hilo hi
Amah a zahtak mite leh ama itna kip a muangte tungah Topa a lungkim hi
Jerusalem khuapi aw, Topa phat in. Zion aw, nangma Pasian phat in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in na kulhkongpi zawlte tosak a, nangma mite thupha hong piaksak hi
Amah in na gamsungah kilemna bawl a, mangbuh hoihpente tawh nang hong gilvahsak hi
Amah in thu hong pia a, ama thu manlangin leitung hong tungsuk hi
Amah in tuumul bangin vukkhal hong pia a, vut bangin vukpak hong thehthang hi
Amah in suangtum bangin tuikhalte hong lawnkhia hi. Tua a votna kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam
Amah in thu pia-in tuate tuisuak hi. Amah in a huih nungsak a, tuite a luang hi
Amah in Jakob tungah ama thu gen a, Israel tungah ama ngeina kipte leh ama biakna ngeina kipte a gen hi
Amah in tua bangin minam dang khat peuhpeuh tungah bawl ngeilo hi. Amaute in amah biakna ngeina kipte theilo uh hi. Topa phat un.
